name: El Macho (prime versión)
description: El Macho was once the most feared villain in the world — a living legend of strength, fearlessness, and pure machismo. His origins are shrouded in mystery, but his legacy is known across borders. Rumored to have gone out in a blaze of glory, El Macho disappeared after one final, explosive stunt... or so the world believed.
creator: Ciminova
